reviews.review_title: How to create a model in this app?
reviews.review_description: I really don't get this app. How do you actually model something in this app? I'm not interested in the marketplace pasting stuff, I want to create something my own. There is absolutely no tutorial on how to do that. Also on youtube only shorts showing marketplace. I thought this app can model things?
It’s good but it crashes after a while, is this normal?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are working hard to fix crashes and are super excited to have some major updates for you to enjoy very soon!

reviews.review_description: The app itself is very good it has some bugs from time to time but the owners fix them very fast and they are very helpful in the discord server! Recommend 1000%!
Don’t know why but the games crashes after a little while, it’s pretty good though

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! We are constantly reviewing and squashing bugs - so look forward to you using it again soon

reviews.review_description: This is a very good app if u don't have a PC to make ugc I recommend this app I'm excited for the next update

developer_response.body: We are excited that you can now make items for Roblox and your favourite games!
